summary: Iteration 51 - Dual-Role Login & Collapsible Sidebar Testing: All 7 test cases passed. Backend returns role:dual for dual-role user, frontend shows role choice step with Administration/Kundenportal options, admin login flow works, sidebar collapse/expand works with logo visible in both states, navigation works in both expanded and collapsed modes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested new dual-role login flow and collapsible sidebar. All features working: (1) /api/auth/check-email returns role:dual for p.courbois@icloud.com, (2) UnifiedLogin.js shows role_choice step with Administration and Kundenportal options, (3) Clicking Administration leads to password step then /admin redirect, (4) Clicking Kundenportal sends magic link and shows confirmation, (5) Admin sidebar collapses to 64px with N logo visible, (6) Sidebar expands back to 240px, (7) Navigation works in both states.

frontend_dual_role_login: Enter dual-role email → role choice step appears - PASSED
Role choice shows 'Mehrfach-Zugang erkannt' badge - PASSED
Administration option shows 'Mit Passwort anmelden' - PASSED
Kundenportal option shows 'Zugangslink per E-Mail' - PASSED
Click Administration → password step appears - PASSED
Click Kundenportal → magic link sent confirmation - PASSED
frontend_sidebar_collapse: Expanded sidebar shows 'N NeXifyAI' logo with all nav labels - PASSED
Hover sidebar reveals collapse toggle button - PASSED
Click collapse → sidebar collapses to 64px icon-only - PASSED
N logo remains visible in collapsed state - PASSED
Nav labels have opacity:0 in collapsed state - PASSED
Click expand → sidebar returns to 240px with labels - PASSED
frontend_navigation: Navigation works in expanded state (projects, leads, billing, monitoring) - PASSED
Navigation works in collapsed state (dashboard, contracts, audit) - PASSED
Topbar title updates correctly on nav click - PASSED

screenshots.02_role_choice_step: Role choice step with Administration and Kundenportal options
screenshots.04_admin_sidebar_expanded: Admin panel with expanded sidebar showing full logo and labels
screenshots.05_admin_sidebar_collapsed: Admin panel with collapsed sidebar showing N logo only
screenshots.06_admin_sidebar_reexpanded: Admin panel with sidebar expanded back
screenshots.07_magic_link_sent: Magic link sent confirmation for Kundenportal choice
